TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Paumeli ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 80 buwan, 270 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 260 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 10 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Paumeli ga Kalatadrang ru Viljauljaul. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Paumeli ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Paumeli ga ungat pqwasan biru. khu skwan biru qalang Paumeli ga maki 1 khu skwan biru tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč paumeli …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu kiŇčő≤oŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. rńßzjal kki Ēan liŇčaj na paumeli …£a kalata*raŇč ru *iljauljaul. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč paumeli …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč paumeli …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru qalaŇč paumeli …£a maki * kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Paumeli ga niya mki sku Tayto Keng atu Kingbong go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 80 buwan, 270 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 96% kyan ku 260 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 4% kyan ku 10 hi nya. rhzyal kki'an lingay na Paumeli ga Kalatadrang ru Viljauljaul. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Paumeli ga ungat kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan qalang Paumeli ga ungat pqwasan biru. khu skwan biru qalang Paumeli ga maki 1 khu skwan biru tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč paumeli …£a nija mki s~…ēku tajto keŇč atu kiŇčő≤oŇč …£o, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, *** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku *** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku ** ńßi nja. rńßzjal kki Ēan liŇčaj na paumeli …£a kalata*raŇč ru *iljauljaul. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj qalaŇč paumeli …£a uŇčat kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan qalaŇč paumeli …£a uŇčat pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru. kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru qalaŇč paumeli …£a maki * kńßu s~…ēkwan ő≤iru tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
